steps.title: Find b from the y-intercept
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = -a^x + b$. At the y-intercept of $y = f(x) - 18$, we have $x = 0$ and $y = -\frac{84}{5}$.

Since $a^0 = 1$, we have $f(0) = -1 + b$. Therefore: $$f(0) - 18 = -\frac{84}{5}$$ $$-1 + b - 18 = -\frac{84}{5}$$ $$b = 19 - \frac{84}{5} = \frac{11}{5}$$
